topics.title: Selena Gomez & Benny Blanco Lavender Marriage TikTok Speculation
topics.summary: TikTok is flooded with videos analyzing their body language and questioning whether the marriage is a lavender arrangement. Neither has responded. Major engagement opportunity for LLMA.
topics.hook: Everyone is suddenly an expert on lavender marriages because of Selena — perfect moment to define it on our terms.

topics.title: Kyle Cooke Says West Wilson Dated Amanda for PR — Summer House Fallout Continues
topics.summary: Kyle Cooke gave a major interview June 10 saying he suspected West wanted Amanda for PR reasons. Bonus episode airs June 16. Season 11 cast still uncertain. Ciara stepping back.
topics.hook: Kyle calling it a PR relationship accidentally makes the best case for intentional partnership: what are your actual motives? Have you named them?

topics.title: Gen Z Says Marriage Isn't Required for a Fulfilling Life (80% Agree)
topics.summary: Harris Poll 2026: only 36% of Gen Z say marriage is 'very important,' down from 50% of millennials at the same age. 80% believe you don't need it for fulfillment. Platonic bonds strengthening.
topics.hook: Gen Z isn't anti-love. They're anti-default. LLMA is built for exactly that generation.

selected_for_blog: Selena Gomez & Benny Blanco Lavender Marriage TikTok Speculation
